title: Official Release of Kimi K2
description: Moonshot AI officially released Kimi K2, positioning it as a high-speed model with strong reasoning and tool-use capabilities. The launch formed the base of the later Kimi K2 turbo and Kimi K2.5 ecosystem.
highlights: Base for later Kimi turbo variants
Important platform milestone for Moonshot AI

sources.title: Kimi Open Platform: New Feature Release Log
